description: Dovetail is a customer intelligence platform for collecting, analyzing, and acting on unstructured customer feedback and research data. It centralizes feedback from multiple sources and uses AI to organize, search, and summarize that information.
summary: Dovetail exposes a bearer-token-authenticated public HTTP API at `https://dovetail.com/api/v1` and a streamable-HTTP MCP server at `https://dovetail.com/api/mcp` that supports OAuth discovery and bearer token auth.
